name: Bureau
description: Identity decisioning and fraud prevention platform for fintech onboarding; risk, behavior and device intelligence APIs.

seo.title: Bureau — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Bureau: Identity decisioning and fraud prevention platform for fintech onboarding; risk, behavior and device intelligence APIs.

when_to_use: Device intelligence for fintech account opening fraud
Behavioral risk scoring during payment authorization
Synthetic identity detection at loan application
KYC decision orchestration with multiple signal fusion
Fraud risk API for BNPL checkout risk assessment

pros: Unified API for device, behavior and identity signals
Strong coverage for Indian and emerging-market onboarding
Fast to integrate for fintech KYC flows
cons: Data depth thinner outside India and SEA
Smaller vendor vs Ekata or LexisNexis
Documentation less mature than global competitors
Limited public pricing and case studies
review.verdict: Solid fintech onboarding stack for India and SEA, weaker fit if your users are mostly in US or EU.
review.best_for: Indian and Southeast Asian fintechs doing high-volume consumer onboarding.
review.not_for: US-only banks that need NIST-grade identity data and a Fortune 500 vendor.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
